Our Story

A Community Cafe
Built on Care

Joanna's Cafe is the kind of place where the staff knows your order, the food is made with intention, and nobody leaves hungry. Located in Dundalk's German Hill Center, we serve our neighbors fresh breakfast and lunch with a genuine smile every day.

From our signature layered sandwiches to freshly baked pastries and rich coffee drinks, every item is crafted with care. We proudly offer gluten-free and vegan options so every guest finds something they love.

Location
1420 Merritt Blvd
Dundalk, MD 21222
Phone
(443) 549-4797
Price Range
$10 — $20 per person
Average Visit

What We Serve

Menu Highlights

Fresh, made-to-order breakfasts and lunches — always flavorful, always affordable.

01

Fresh-Baked Pastries

Golden, flaky, and filled with rich cherry preserve. Baked fresh in-house every morning — best enjoyed warm.

Bakery Favorite
02

Breakfast Sandwich

Fluffy egg, crispy bacon, and melted cheddar stacked on a perfectly toasted roll. A morning staple done right.

Breakfast Classic
03

Yacht Club Three-Layer

Turkey, ham, bacon, avocado spread, lettuce and tomato stacked on toasted bread. Our signature lunch.

Signature Sandwich
04

Specialty Iced Coffee

House cold brew swirled with cream, topped with fresh whipped cream and mint. A drink worth coming back for.

Coffee Bar
05

Bakery Case

Muffins, scones, croissants, cookies and more — all made in-house and rotating daily. See what is fresh today.

Baked Daily
06

Full Menu Online

Browse our complete breakfast and lunch offerings, seasonal specials, and all gluten-free and vegan selections on our ordering page.

View Full Menu
Why Guests Love Us

The Joanna's Difference

More than just good food — it is the experience, the care, and the community that keeps people coming back again and again.

Attentive Service

Staff goes above and beyond — from allergen checks to warm welcomes, every guest is treated with genuine care.

Fresh Daily

Everything is made fresh every morning. Quality ingredients prepared with intention and served at their very best.

Dietary Options

Gluten-free and vegan options always available — because great food should be accessible and enjoyable for everyone.

Unbeatable Value

Fresh, flavorful meals at prices that genuinely surprise. Guests consistently rave about the value Joanna's delivers.

1

They were truly paying attention. After I ordered, they realized there was another ingredient with milk and came out to ask me about it. Wonderful service and attention to detail.

Verified Guest

Staff is super friendly, food is so fresh and delicious, and even the prices are unbeatable. This place is a real gem in Dundalk. Highly recommend for anyone wanting a great local spot.

Regular Customer

When I had a concern, I called and spoke with Chris who was professional, understanding, and committed to making things right. That is the kind of ownership that earns real loyalty.

Loyal Guest
Come On In

A Space as
Warm as the Food

Step inside and you will find an inviting space filled with natural light, fresh flowers on the tables, and the quiet hum of a place that feels like home. Whether you are stopping in for a quick coffee or settling in for a full lunch, you are always welcome here.

Outdoor seating is also available for those who prefer to enjoy their meal in the fresh air on a beautiful day.
